title: Snowyee Splatter Screen for Frying Pan, Grease Splatter Guard Stainless Steel Large 13” and Small 10” Shield (2 in 1 Set)
features: 【Prevents Splatter and Mess】— The Frying Pan Splatter Guard Protects from Hot Oil or Water Splatter While Cooking and Allows You to Enjoy Frying Without the Mess
【Quality Stainless Steel】— Made High-Quality Splatter Screen for Frying Pan which are Unbreakable Even After Long Time use
【Universal Size】— With the Splatter Guard for Frying Fits Securely on Most Pots, Pans, and Skillets which for outdoor Cooking for Hamburg, Bacon and Mushroom etc
【Safe for Stove Top Use】— The Splash Guard for Frying Pan Fully Covers the All Size Stove Top to Protect from Splatter and Safely Contains Oil While Frying
【Easy to Clean】— Wipes Clean Easily Compared to other Splash Guards Options
